snippets.title: async/await with error handling
snippets.explanation: await unwraps the resolved value; rejections are caught with ordinary try/catch.

snippets.title: Sequential vs parallel
snippets.explanation: Promise.all runs independent calls concurrently and resolves to an array of results.

snippets.title: Timeout with Promise.race
snippets.explanation: Whichever settles first wins; the timeout rejects if the model is too slow.

snippets.title: Collect successes and failures
snippets.explanation: allSettled never rejects; each entry reports fulfilled value or rejected reason.
